args.query: SELECT TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(o.OwnerId,1,1) = '#' THEN substr(o.OwnerId,2) ELSE o.OwnerId END) AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesTotal FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY SalesTotal DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT TRIM(CASE WHEN substr(o.OwnerId,1,1) = '#' THEN substr(o.OwnerId,2) ELSE o.OwnerId END) AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesTotal FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY AgentId ORDER BY SalesTotal DESC LIMIT 1;
